evals.prompt: /contentforge:cf-style-guide Acme Corp — a B2B SaaS cybersecurity company targeting enterprise CISOs
evals.expected_output: A complete brand profile following config/brand-registry-template.json, saved to ~/.claude-marketing/acme-corp/Brand-Guidelines/Acme Corp-brand-profile.json (canonical path)

assertions.text: Brand profile JSON follows the config/brand-registry-template.json schema, including at minimum the sections: brand_name, industry, voice, terminology, guardrails, target_audience, tracking
Voice guidelines reflect B2B enterprise tone: authoritative, technical, trust-building
Guardrails include industry-appropriate restrictions (no fear-mongering, accurate threat claims)
Profile is saved at the canonical path ~/.claude-marketing/{brand-slug}/Brand-Guidelines/{BrandName}-brand-profile.json with the brand slug in kebab-case, and the path is reported to the user
A tracking backend (google_sheets, airtable, or local) is configured in the profile's tracking section, with Step G.0 environment/Drive probes run before the backend menu is offered

evals.prompt: Import our brand guidelines from https://example.com/brand-guide and set up the ContentForge profile
evals.expected_output: Skill fetches the URL, extracts brand voice, terminology, and guardrails, and creates a profile with imported guidelines at the canonical Brand-Guidelines path

assertions.text: URL is fetched and content is analyzed for brand voice characteristics
Extracted guidelines are saved into the brand profile JSON at ~/.claude-marketing/{brand-slug}/Brand-Guidelines/
User is asked to confirm or adjust extracted voice attributes before saving
